title: Stipella parviflora
taxonomy: Stipella parviflora belongs to the family Asteraceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. The genus Stipella is part of the tribe Heliantheae, which includes many species of daisies and marigolds. Stipella parviflora is native to tropical Africa and is often found growing in dry, sandy areas. Its classification also includes being a part of the subfamily Asteroideae. Further classification can be broken down to the species level, but the above-mentioned classification is a general overview of this plant's taxonomic position.
